## CONVERSION TO OUTPUT

### 1. Process-as-Product Deck
> Rob-style audience gets:
- One visual deck
- 5 frameworks
- 1 visual map
- All tied to results/outcomes

### 2. Lifestyle Business Command Kit
> Turns GPT session into:
- Coaching scripts
- Brand calendar
- Funnel templates

### 3. Productized Workshop Flow
